title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates rebuilding an AI Dark Factory workflow to combine Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 models. Opus handles deep reasoning and planning steps while Kimi K2.6 manages implementation, validation, and research to maintain token efficiency at scale. The system uses Archon, an open-source AI coding harness, to orchestrate multi-model execution.
